_comment: Example .nilsson/config.json `project` descriptor (issue #9). Copy the `project` block into your project's .nilsson/config.json. This is the minesweeper-arena worked example: a separate server Nilsson starts but does not mount in-process.

project._remote_example: Set target to 'remote' and fill remote.url to serve it elsewhere; `preview` pushes the `preview` branch and runs remote.sync so you see changes before a PR.

sync: cd minesweeper-arena && git fetch origin && git checkout -B preview origin/preview && sudo systemctl restart minesweeper
